org_constraint: The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email should consist of 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least four sentences.

I am writing to formally introduce myself as a potential research associate. My name is Alex Morgan, and I hold a degree in Applied Physics. I have consistently ranked in the top five percent of my graduating class. Your department is known for its exceptional standards of excellence.

I am seeking a position that allows me to apply my practical knowledge. I have completed several internships related to your specific field of study. I am confident that my background matches your current staffing needs.

I would welcome the possibility of scheduling a brief introductory meeting soon. My availability is flexible during standard business hours next week. Please contact me at your earliest convenience to discuss this further.<|im_end|>

final_answer:
I am writing to formally introduce myself as a potential research associate. My name is Alex Morgan, and I hold a degree in Applied Physics. I have consistently ranked in the top five percent of my graduating class. Your department is known for its exceptional standards of excellence.

I am seeking a position that allows me to apply my practical knowledge. I have completed several internships related to your specific field of study. I am confident that my background matches your current staffing needs.

I would welcome the possibility of scheduling a brief introductory meeting soon. My availability is flexible during standard business hours next week. Please contact me at your earliest convenience to discuss this further.<|im_end|>
